sql_examples.executive: SELECT title, metric, story FROM story_cards ORDER BY title;
sql_examples.spatial: SELECT layer_name, feature_count, line_length_km FROM spatial_layers WHERE status = 'read' ORDER BY feature_count DESC LIMIT 8;
sql_examples.map: SELECT feature_group, geometry_type, coordinates_json FROM map_surface_features ORDER BY feature_group, feature_id;
sql_examples.raw_tables: SELECT table_group, table_name, COUNT(*) AS cells FROM raw_table_cells GROUP BY table_group, table_name ORDER BY cells DESC;
